result.stdout:
Description:
  Minfold

Usage:
  minfold [options]

Options:
  -d, --database <database> (REQUIRED)      The database to scaffold
  -c, --connection <connection> (REQUIRED)  The database connection string
  -p, --codePath <codePath> (REQUIRED)      Path to a folder containing a single .csproj project. If multiple projects are present, use --project to choose one.
  --stdDecorate                             Decorates stdout,stderror and each output line with a prefix info|warn|err
  --version                                 Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                            Show help and usage information

Options:

  --stdDecorate                             Decorates stdout,stderror and each output line with a prefix info|warn|err
  --version                                 Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                            Show help and usage information
